error_map.hint: slack api_token/access_token is missing or invalid; re-run pm credentials add slack
slack API rate limit exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (Slack Web API's primary error-signaling mechanism is a JSON body {ok:false,error:<code>} field returned at HTTP 200 -- the declarative read path has no way to inspect a body-level ok flag as a stop/error condition); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for slack and internal/connectors/hooks/slack/hooks_test.go

StreamHook-handled (Slack Web API's primary error-signaling mechanism is a JSON body {ok:false,error:<code>} field returned at HTTP 200, and this stream additionally requires a runtime-only config.channel_id the declarative path cannot conditionally require); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for slack and internal/connectors/hooks/slack/hooks_test.go
